items.title: How Berkshire Hathaway Performed During Buffett's Final Quarter
items.description: Buffett’s final quarter saw a 25% drop in net income, but his final portfolio moves—including increased positions in Chubb and Chevron—have proven prescient.

items.title: Berkshire Hathaway's New CEO Omits Bank of America And Chevron In Letter To Shareholders After Warren Buffett's Exit
items.description: In his inaugural letter to shareholders as CEO, Greg Abel signaled a potential shift in Berkshire Hathaway Inc.'s equity strategy by not mentioning two of the firm's largest holdings from his list of “core” investments. The ‘Core Four’ Vs. The Missing Giants Abel's letter emphasized a “concentrated approach” toward businesses Berkshire intends to hold for decades. While Apple Inc., American Express Co., Coca-Cola Co., and Moody's Corp. were solidified as forever stocks. Don't Miss: This Energy S

items.title: Major Food Group and American Express to host CARBONE BEACH during FORMULA 1 CRYPTO.COM MIAMI GRAND PRIX Weekend
items.description: American Express and Major Food Group (MFG), the hospitality powerhouse led by Mario Carbone, Jeff Zalaznick, and Rich Torrisi, are proud to announce the fifth edition of Amex x CARBONE BEACH. The iconic three-night "Supper Club on the Sand" returns during the FORMULA 1 CRYPTO.COM MIAMI GRAND PRIX Friday through Sunday, May 1–3, 2026. The event is one of the weekend's most anticipated dining and entertainment experiences, once again transforming the Miami shoreline into an unparalleled destinati

items.title: Berkshire Is Sitting On $819 Million Or More in Google Gains — So Why Won't The New Boss Talk About It?
items.description: Berkshire Hathaway bought shares of Alphabet in the third quarter of 2025. The stock has posted impressive gains, but new CEO Greg Abel is silent on GOOGL.

items.title: A low credit score could cost you nearly $400 in interest each year. Here's how to fix it
items.description: Your credit score is a big factor in your credit card's APR, and it could be costing you hundreds.
